response.justification: Aisha has extensive experience as a Senior Fullstack Developer with a strong background in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, matching the primary stack. Her roles demonstrate deep expertise in scalable systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and cross-language development. While her primary stack aligns well, her secondary skills in Kotlin/Java are mentioned but less detailed, and her focus on Dlang is outside the required stack.
strengths: Proven experience in end-to-end fullstack development with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Strong background in scalable systems and AI-agent infrastructure (relevant for modern enterprise tooling)
Diverse language proficiency (TypeScript, Java, Kotlin, Python) and cloud/containerization expertise (AWS, Docker)
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Vitest testing framework in resume (core requirement)
Secondary stack (Kotlin/Java) is not prominently featured in recent roles
No direct experience with PostgreSQL or MySQL mentioned in recent roles (core requirement)
